title: lannea humilis
intro: Lannea humilis is a species of shrub or small tree in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa and known for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lannea humilis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Lannea humilis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
